text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A fan letter arrives for Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoaaaa! For me? A fan letter?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That means there's someone out there giving me
their support!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Sorry—I just don't know how to put this feeling
into words!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So I guess my body kinda started expressing itself
on its own!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'll work even harder now! I need to, for
the people out there putting their hope in me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I promise I'll give them something back! I'll do it by winning races!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: And to do that, I'll have to...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna go run!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WOO HOO! I'm gonna run my socks off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can stop her, she dashes out toward the
twilit track.
